rationale: Trump halting Iran strikes and claiming a peace deal is a major domestic political and financial market event for US residents — stocks surged, and the policy shift directly affects US military posture and oil prices.

top_events.title: Trump halts Iran strikes, claims deal near; stock markets surge
top_events.summary: Trump called off new strikes on Iran and claimed a deal is approved; US stock markets surged significantly. This directly affects US investors, retirement accounts, and oil prices, while reshaping US Middle East military posture.

top_events.title: Hegseth warns Cuba against acquiring weapons at Guantánamo visit
top_events.summary: US Defense Secretary's Cuba warning signals continued US military posturing in the Western Hemisphere; relevant to US foreign policy and potential regional tensions.

top_events.title: Toronto police officer shot during US consulate attack investigation
top_events.summary: Attack near US consulate in Canada; minor direct US relevance but signals security concerns at diplomatic facilities.
